all.Example_Global_Query: search index=alerts title="*{site_names} - *" | stats count by title
all.Another_Global_Query: search index=alerts | stats count by src, dhost

all.Fortigate_Auth_Success: search index={index} "logged in successfully" | stats count by src duser host msg | table src duser host msg count
all.Fortigate_Auth_Fail: search index={index} "login failed" | stats count by src duser host msg

example_site_id.Fortigate_Site_Specific: search index={index} "tunnel-up" | stats count by src dst

all.Windows_Login_Success: search index={index} EventCode=4624 | stats count by user src_ip
